reading: Path C scale probe. Confirms the exact A(19,6) certificate is COMPUTE-BOUND, not impossible: the dual blocks round to PSD (P=1e8 for CLARABEL-era duals; P=1e12–1e14 for the default SDPA-GMP duals), the min-norm restoration zeroes the stationarity residuals, and ⌊Σγ−ν⌋ = 1280 (the certificate EXISTS and floors correctly). The wall is EXACT NONNEGATIVITY — hundreds of multipliers come out negative, so the one-at-a-time clamp is O(hundreds × seconds). Completing A(19,6) needs a bit-controlled rational LP (Bareiss/integer-preserving simplex, min Σγ−ν s.t. stationarity + α,β1,γ≥0) and/or a high-precision solve (SDPA-GMP) so the duals are well-separated — the panel's D6. Small cells (n≤8) are already full exact certs (terwilliger_cert, GREEN).
